SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-23-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-23-2018 BY PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY DONNA ALBERTO , LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST.
